claim_types.label: Warranty Claim
claim_types.description: Standard Hyundai warranty claim for warrantable repairs performed under applicable warranty coverage.
when_to_use: Use when labor, parts, towing, sublet, or related items are being claimed under Hyundai warranty
Use when the repair is not a campaign, PDI, maintenance, or rental-only claim

claim_types.label: Campaign Claim
claim_types.description: Claim type for recall or service campaign repairs tied to Hyundai campaign rules and campaign operation codes.
when_to_use: Use for recall or campaign-related repairs
Use when the repair is tied to a Hyundai campaign number, bulletin, or remedy instruction
Use when campaign rules determine labor, parts, and attachment requirements

claim_types.label: PDI Claim
claim_types.description: Claim type for Hyundai pre-delivery inspection reimbursement and related dealer processing.
when_to_use: Use only when PDI timing and eligibility rules are satisfied
Do not use when repair occurred after retail delivery or demo date if Hyundai rules prohibit submission

claim_types.label: Rental / SRC Claim
claim_types.description: Claim type for Service Rental Car, 3rd Party Rental, or Rideshare reimbursement tied to an eligible repair or campaign claim.
when_to_use: Use for SRC, 3rd Party Rental, or Rideshare reimbursement
Use only when there is a corresponding paid warranty claim, campaign claim, or certain eligible customer-pay condition
Use only when reimbursement criteria are satisfied

claim_types.label: Maintenance Claim
claim_types.description: Claim type for Hyundai maintenance-program submissions when allowed by Hyundai claim rules and program requirements.
when_to_use: Use when Hyundai directs maintenance items through a maintenance-claim workflow
Use only for covered maintenance-program situations, not general customer-pay service

claim_types.label: Foreign Claim
claim_types.description: Claim type or workflow used for vehicles involving foreign or non-standard jurisdiction handling.
when_to_use: Use when Hyundai directs the claim through foreign-claim handling
Use when jurisdiction, distribution, or country-specific handling applies

claim_types.label: CUV Claim
claim_types.description: Claim path for Hyundai certified used vehicle claim processing when applicable.
when_to_use: Use when the repair falls under Hyundai CUV claim handling
Use only when Hyundai CUV policy and portal workflow applies
